title: Re-install Heap Analytics Script
description: Re-install the Heap analytics tracking script into the application's HTML head section, matching the previously used configuration. Separate script configurations are maintained for DEV and PROD environments.
acceptance_criteria: Heap analytics script is installed before the closing </head> tag
Separate script configurations exist for DEV and PROD environments
Script matches the previously used Heap configuration
implementation_notes: Heap analytics script was re-installed in the HTML head with environment-specific configurations for DEV and PROD.
comment_summary: Waqar confirmed the Heap script was inserted.
